description: Maps CSV header names from tbf-grants-disclosure-*.csv to ab.ab_grants columns.
notes: Header names are matched case-insensitively and after trimming whitespace and BOM.
Values that are empty, pure whitespace, or a single space are stored as NULL.
Amount values may be plain decimals (e.g. '110965.000') or currency strings (e.g. '"-$7,000.00 "'). Dollar signs, commas, and surrounding whitespace are stripped before parsing.
PaymentDate values may be empty or ISO YYYY-MM-DD. Empty becomes NULL. Postgres parses the string.
No ON CONFLICT clause is used: CSV rows have no mongo_id, so they are inserted as new rows with mongo_id=NULL.
